zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Ralph Gernon於1220年出生在英國英格蘭艾可時，他的父親William de Gernon31歲，母親Beatrice Theydon30歲。他於大約1249年與Eleanor De Vere結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1274年在英國英格蘭德比夏爾貝克韋爾_享年54歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Ralph Gernon于1220年出生在英国英格兰艾可时，他的父亲William de Gernon31岁，母亲Beatrice Theydon30岁。他于大约1249年与Eleanor De Vere结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1274年在英国英格兰德比夏爾貝克韋爾_享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: Gernon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Grennan   1.

variants.name: Grennan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Eamon, Kieran.
English (Lancashire, of Norman origin): nickname for a man with a moustache, from Old French gernon, grenon ‘moustache’.
Irish (Offaly, Westmeath and Down): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Grianáin (see Greenan ).

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Ralph Gernon was born in 1220, in Essex, England, United Kingdom, his father, William de Gernon, was 31 and his mother, Beatrice Theydon, was 30. He married Eleanor De Vere about 1249. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1274, in Bakewell, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Ralph Gernon est né en 1220, à Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Gernon, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Beatrice Theydon, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Eleanor De Vere environ 1249. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1274, à Bakewell, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Ralph Gernon 1220 in Essex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Gernon 31 und seine Mutter Beatrice Theydon 30. Er hat um 1249 Eleanor De Vere geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1274 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Bakewell, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Ralph Gernon è nato il nel 1220 nel Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William de Gernon, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Beatrice Theydon, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Eleanor De Vere circa 1249. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1274, nel Bakewell, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph Gernonが1220年にイギリスイギリスエセックスで生まれた時，父William de Gernonは31歳，母Beatrice Theydonは30歳であった。約1249年にEleanor De Vereと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1274年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアベイケウエルで54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph Gernon(이)가 1220년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Gernon(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Beatrice Theydon(은)는 30세였다. 그는 대략 1249년 Eleanor De Vere(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1274년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 베이케웰에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Ralph Gernon nasceu em 1220, em Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William de Gernon, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Beatrice Theydon, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Eleanor De Vere aproximadamente 1249. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1274, em Bakewell, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 54 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Ralph Gernon родился в 1220 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William de Gernon было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Beatrice Theydon, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor De Vere около 1249 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1274 г. в местности беикюелл, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 54 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Ralph Gernon nació en 1220, en Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William de Gernon, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Beatrice Theydon, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Eleanor De Vere aproximadamente 1249. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1274, en Bakewell, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 54 años.
